{{Quote|Alderaan does not have a significant military capability. They rely on us to do their fighting.|Jedi Master Ph'ton|<ref name="General Grievous 1">[[General Grievous 1|''General Grievous'' 1]]</ref>}}
The '''Battle of Alderaan''' was one of several armed conflicts revolving around the [[Alderaan system/Legends|Alderaan system]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

==Prologue==
Around [[20 BBY/Legends|20 BBY]], the [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]] had gathered warships in the [[Alderaan system/Legends|Alderaan system]]. These were not enough to launch a full-scale invasion of [[Alderaan/Legends|Alderaan]], but enough to harass any convoys attempting to send aid. As a result of this, a convoy sending vital goods to Alderaan was put under the protection of a [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] task force, specifically aimed at engaging any [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist]] forces that tried to stop them. However, due to Alderaan's insignificant military capabilities, they depended upon the Republic forces to do battle alone, and all Jedi fighters were told to spread out and engage enemy fighters as soon as they exited hyperspace, drawing their fire away from the convoy.

==A different path==
Right before the convoy prepared to jump into [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]], one of the [[Delta-7 Aethersprite-class light interceptor/Legends|Jedi starfighters]] was infiltrated and hijacked by [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] [[Flynn Kybo]], looking to link up with a small group of Jedi plotting to assassinate [[General/Legends|General]] [[Grievous/Legends|Grievous]] on their own.

==Aftermath==
The outcome of the battle appeared to be a victory for the Republic, as Alderaan was said to have been "threatened", not "conquered", by the CIS, yet the horrors of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] was enough for the Alderaanians to dismantle what little military capability they had after the war. Though they publicly claimed to have no weapons left, they actually put their arsenal on board the unmanned [[Alderaanian War Frigate]] ''[[Another Chance]]'', which was left to jump through [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] unless recalled by the Alderaanian Council of Elders.
